title: GrowGeneration (NASDAQ:GRWG) Stock, Earnings Estimates, EPS, And Revenue - Benzinga
text: GrowGeneration Earnings Summary and Analysis. Historical Performance: Company experienced dramatic cycle from growth to contraction. Peak in 2021 with strong profitability. Subsequent downturn in 2022-2023 from cannabis industry oversupply. Recovery trajectory emerging in 2024-2025. Current Metrics: Market cap depressed reflecting turnaround phase. Revenue declining but stabilizing. EBITDA path to profitability visible. Valuation attractive for believers in turnaround. Key Catalysts: Proprietary brand expansion. Cannabis industry stabilization. Cost structure optimization. Margin recovery. Investment Risk: Speculative turnaround. Cannabis industry cyclicality. Competition and consolidation risks. Market sentiment turning positive on operational improvements.
